close_reason: Core refactoring complete for Go. New architecture: starlark object model, extraction protocol, go-deps-extract, mapper, rulessync. Additional language extractors (Phase 5) can be added incrementally.
description:
# Overview

Refactor the rules.star auto-sync system to use a cleaner architecture:

1. **Language-specific extractors** - Separate binaries that use native tooling for each language
2. **Starlark object model** - Proper AST-based parsing with modification tracking
3. **Mutation API** - Clean interface for adding/removing deps, creating targets
4. **Smart serialization** - Preserve unchanged code, only re-serialize modified parts

## Why

Current approach has issues:
- Fragile text editing with bracket counting and regex
- Go regex parsing other languages' imports
- Tight coupling between detection, mapping, and mutation
- Hacky preservation of unchanged code

## Phases

- Phase 1: Starlark Object Model (foundation)
- Phase 2: Extraction Protocol
- Phase 3: Go Extractor (reference implementation)
- Phase 4: Mapping Layer
- Phase 5: Additional Language Extractors
- Phase 6: Integration (replace current implementation)
title: Refactor rules.star sync to use proper object model
